title: delosperma invalidum
intro: Delosperma invalidum, also known as the yellow mountain daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Delosperma invalidum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of conditions.
